message:
deps: bump tracing 0.1.41 -> 0.1.44

Patch bump within 0.1.x. Bugfix + new `#[instrument]` attributes; existing
`info!` / `span!` call sites unchanged.

Verification: rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -69,7 +69,7 @@ smallvec = "1.15.1"
 tempfile = "3.27.0"
 thiserror = "2.0.18"
 toml = "1.1.2"
-tracing = "0.1.41"
+tracing = "0.1.44"
 tracing-subscriber = "0.3.19"
 xxhash-rust = { version = "0.8.15", features = ["xxh3"] }
 fuser = { version = "0.16.0", features = ["abi-7-31"] }
